title: platanthera densa subsp. densa
intro: Platanthera densa subsp. densa, also known as the alpine orchid, is a species of orchid found in high-altitude mountainous regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been employed in herbal preparations to treat various health issues. The alpine orchid is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are said to offer benefits such as reduced fever, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function.
